penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - suture ends were not cut inside the trainer and final knot security cannot be confirmed from the visible frames.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude identified incomplete task with suture ends not cut inside trainer, while GPT reported full completion with specific penalties. Given the fundamental disagreement and Claude's specific observation about suture material extending outside the trainer in final frames, the incomplete task assessment is more defensible under the rubric's completion requirements.
